exec: pm.test("Login successful", function() {
pm.response.to.be.success;
var jsonData = pm.response.json();
pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.eql(true);
pm.expect(jsonData.data.token).to.be.a("string");
if (pm.response.json()?.data?.token) {
pm.collectionVariables.set("authToken", pm.response.json().data.token);

Allowed transitions:
- CREATED → PICKED_UP | CANCELLED
- PICKED_UP → IN_TRANSIT | CANCELLED
- IN_TRANSIT → OUT_FOR_DELIVERY | CANCELLED
- OUT_FOR_DELIVERY → DELIVERED | CANCELLED
- DELIVERED / CANCELLED → (none)

Special rules:
- DELIVERED requires OTP verification first; COD must be collected if exists.
- CANCELLED not allowed if already delivered.
- OUT_FOR_DELIVERY sends SMS to receiver.
- DELIVERED sends SMS to receiver.
(Required) Shipment ID
(Required) Shipment ID
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

info.name: Delivery Backend API
info.description:
Delivery Backend API — Logistics delivery management.

Auth flow: POST /auth/login then use Authorization: Bearer {{authToken}}

Seed credentials:
- ADMIN: admin@example.com / Password123!
- STAFF: staff@example.com / Password123!
- DRIVER: driver@example.com / Password123!
- CUSTOMER: customer@example.com / Password123!

Response envelope: { success, message, data }
